items.title: 干货！6种词汇教学组织形式，让学生记得牢用得活
items.content:
这是吴熳的第420篇教学思考原创。昨天在群里看到Rara分享的上海小学生的词汇学习海报，类似于下图但不是原图，有非常清晰的思维的总结。觉得真的是很有必要来思考一下，词汇教学的基本组织形式，你可以用这些组织形式，让学生画类似于上图的词汇思维导图，不求美观，但求思维清晰，分类明确。一、 语义场组织法这是最经典、最核心的词汇组织方式，主要围绕单词的意义关系进行。1. 上下义关系 · 描述：表示一般概念的词（上义词）和表示具体概念的词（下义词）之间的关系。 · 示例： · 上义词：Fruit · 下义词：apple, banana, orange, grape · 教学应用：用于归类、总结和扩展词汇。可以画“思维导图”或“词汇树”。2. 整体-部分关系 · 描述：表示一个整体事物与其组成部分之间的关系。 · 示例： · 整体：Bicycle · 部分：handlebar, saddle, wheel, pedal, chain · 整体：Body · 部分：head, arm, leg, chest, abdomen3. 同义关系 · 描述：意义相同或非常相近的单词。教学时关键在于辨析其细微差别（如语体、感情色彩、搭配）。 · 示例：happy - joyful - delighted - ecstatic； big - large - huge - enormous4. 反义关系 · 描述：意义相反的单词。 · 示例： · 等级反义：hot - cold (中间有warm, cool) · 互补反义：alive - dead (非此即彼) · 关系反义：buy - sell, husband - wife, above - below5. 搭配关系 · 描述：单词之间习惯性的共现关系。这是使语言变得地道的关键。 · 示例： · 动词+名词：make a mistake, do homework, take a shower · 形容词+名词：strong coffee, heavy rain, powerful computer · 副词+动词：deeply regret, strongly recommend二、 主题/情境组织法将单词放入一个共同的主题或具体生活情境中，便于整体记忆和实际运用。1. 主题式 · 描述：围绕一个宽泛的主题组织单词。 · 示例： · 主题：Education · 词汇：teacher, student, classroom, exam, homework, university, degree, lecture · 教学应用：这是单元式教材最常用的方法。2. 情境式 · 描述：在一个非常具体的情景中学习单词。 · 示例： · 情境：At the Airport · 词汇：check-in, boarding pass, security, gate, departure, arrival, luggage · 教学应用：角色扮演、情景对话的绝佳素材。三、 语法/结构组织法从单词的语法属性和形态结构入手。1. 词性分组 · 描述：将同一词性的单词放在一起学习，尤其适用于介绍基本句法结构。 · 示例： · 动词：run, eat, think, have · 形容词：beautiful, intelligent, expensive · 介词：in, on, at, under2. 词族/词根词缀法 · 描述：通过一个词根，学习其不同词性（派生词）的变化。 · 示例： · 词根：care · 词族：careful (adj.), carefully (adv.), careless (adj.), carelessness (n.) · 示例： · 词根：employ · 词族：employer (n.), employee (n.), employment (n.), unemployed (adj.)3. 搭配中的语法结构 · 描述：根据单词要求的特定语法结构来分组。 · 示例： · 后接to do的动词：want to do, decide to do, hope to do · 后接doing的动词：enjoy doing, finish doing, avoid doing · 与介词搭配的形容词：interested in, good at, afraid of四、 技能与应用组织法侧重于词汇的听、说、读、写技能。1. 听力词汇：专注于单词的发音、重音、在连贯语流中的变化（如连读、弱读）。2. 口语词汇：通常是高频、简单的词，搭配常用表达和“语块”。3. 阅读词汇：可能包含大量低频词、学术词汇，主要通过阅读上下文来学习。4. 写作词汇：更正式、更精确，强调拼写、同义词替换以避免重复。五、 认知与记忆组织法利用人类大脑的认知特点来辅助记忆。1. 图示法 · 描述：利用图片、照片、图表等视觉工具直接建立单词与形象的联系，绕过母语翻译。 · 示例：学习apple时直接展示苹果图片。学习prepositions时用图表示in the box, on the box, under the box。2. 心智图/思维导图 · 描述：以一个核心概念为中心，向外发散关联的词汇，是多种组织方式的综合体现。 · 示例：中心词Travel，向外发散出分支Transportation (plane, train...), Accommodation (hotel, hostel...), Activities (sightseeing, hiking...), People (tourist, guide...)。3. 语义映射 · 描述：比思维导图更结构化，通常围绕一个主题，从不同维度（如：是什么、有什么、做什么、像什么）来组织词汇。 · 示例：主题Ocean。 · 是什么：sea, water, marine · 有什么：fish, whale, coral, salt · 做什么：swim, sail, dive, pollute · 像什么：blue, vast, deep, mysterious六、 其他实用组织方式1. 频率排序：按照单词在语言中使用频率的高低来教学（如先学the, be, to, of, and）。2. 最小对立体：将发音相近的单词放在一起对比，训练辨音能力。 · 示例：ship / sheep, right / light, bag / back3. 词源学：对于高级学习者，讲解单词的历史来源和演变，可以帮助记忆一系列相关词汇。 · 示例：aqua-（水）-> aquarium, aquatic, aquifer教学流程建议在实际教学中，这些方式通常是混合使用的。一个典型的词汇教学流程可能是：1. 呈现：使用主题/情境法或图示法引入一组新词。2. 梳理：用语义场法（如上下义、反义）或思维导图帮助学生理清单词间关系。3. 深化：通过搭配关系和词族法加深学生对单词用法的理解。4. 练习：设计情境式活动（如角色扮演）或任务，让学生在应用中巩固。5. 评估：通过填空、造句、分类、写作等方式检查掌握情况。当然我相信这种做法，从一开始对你和学生来说都有难度，等到你告诉学生，有这样的方式来组织单词之后，学生就能逐渐通过这种方法来总结，处理本单元新学的单词。今日份彩蛋：时隔四年，吃了一顿火锅🥘画废了的几张图，但美感还不错。公众号，我觉得最值得看的文章是？当然是已经连着日更十一个月350篇的

items.title: 实测，同样画带数字的塑胶跑道，7个AI的表现天差地别
items.content:
这是吴熳的第421篇教学思考原创。今天不卷了，想通过一个简单的画图测验下现在的AI工具们的语义理解能力和画图实际能实现的能力。为什么画一张课件配图花两小时，我却觉得挺值得|吴熳教学思考63在看这篇之前，值得打开上面的链接，看看2024年10月，AI工具画图的水平……看过前情提要之后，再来看这一篇，就能感受到大模型画图能力的变化了。我只是需要它给我把12345678，分别放在该放的跑道上而已啊。首先，看看仍然水平欠奉的选手们，即梦的图，还原度非常不错，但是文字不对。阶跃的图，很失真，两头加起来凑齐了8。法国员工mistral，对它的期待有多大，失望就有多深。Chatgpt，这次比一年前强多了，除了没把7和8画出来，不过，质感远不如即梦。Claude，貌似画出来了正确的答案，对吧？实际上这是我截图出来的样子，它是用代码画出来的，从而保证了准确度，但看着真的不太像跑道。Grok,这个选手我已经有很久没有用过了，但它出来的效果还挺出乎意料的。最后，一次性画对的选手，竟然是豆包，seedream 4.0确实厉害，但即梦也是用的4.0啊，怎么就没成功呢？anyway，能在完全不修改的情况下，画成这样，是AI画图大模型们的胜利✌️相信到明年，用AI辅助英语教学，今日份彩蛋：今天的小熊猫，累得逐渐黑化。公众号，我觉得最值得看的文章是？当然是已经连着日更十一个月350篇的

items.title: 精准教学！语篇分析的初中高三层提问Prompt设计指南
items.content:
这是吴熳的第422篇教学思考原创。语篇分析中，如果明晰教学不同层次，根据初、中、高三个水平对应的教学提问用不同Prompt，相信会非常有帮助。以下我们以一篇短文为例，展示三个水平的不同提问prompt。The Great Forest ShiftFor centuries, the towering Redwoods of Whispering Pines Forest stood unchallenged. Their dense canopy created a cool, moist understory, perfect for ferns and shade-loving creatures. However, a severe drought last year weakened many of the old giants, making them susceptible to bark beetles. As these trees died, sunlight flooded the forest floor.This unexpected change became an opportunity. Sun-loving seedlings, like the resilient Manzanita bushes, which had lain dormant for years, began to sprout vigorously. They stabilized the soil and provided food for a new set of animals, such as rabbits and bees. The forest ecosystem, once dominated by a single type of tree, began transforming into a more diverse and drought-resistant mosaic.Ultimately, this event demonstrates nature's remarkable capacity for adaptation. What initially appeared as a catastrophe paved the way for renewed life and biodiversity, proving that change, while often disruptive, is an essential engine of ecological evolution.下面，根据这张图，你可以从这三个层面来重构对文本的理解。1. 初级水平提问目标： 确保学生理解文本的基本信息和字面意思。Prompt 1: What is the main topic of this passage?Prompt 2: What happened to the Redwoods in the forest?Prompt 3: What does "dormant" mean in the second paragraph?Prompt 4: What new plants started to grow after the drought?示例回答：A1: It's about how a forest changed after a drought.A2: They were weakened by drought and killed by bark beetles.A3: It means "inactive" or "asleep", not growing.A4: Manzanita bushes.2. 中级水平提问目标： 引导学生分析文本的结构和信息间的逻辑关系。Prompt 1: How does the author organize the information? What structure is being used?Prompt 2: How does the death of the Redwoods (Idea A) lead to the growth of new plants (Idea B)?Prompt 3: What is the relationship between the first and second paragraph?Prompt 4: What linking words does the author use to show the sequence of events? 示例回答：A1: The author uses a cause-and-effect structure. It first describes the cause (drought killing redwoods) and then the effects (changes in the ecosystem).A2: The death of the Redwoods opened up the canopy, allowing sunlight to reach the forest floor. This sunlight was the necessary condition for the dormant, sun-loving seedlings to sprout.A3: The first paragraph sets up the problem or change, and the second paragraph describes the direct consequences and the beginning of transformation.A4: Words like "however" (shows contrast), "as" (shows time/cause), and "this unexpected change" (refers back to the previous event).3. 高级水平提问目标： 培养学生批判性思维，探究作者的意图、策略和文本的深层含义。Prompt 1: Why does the writer choose to end the passage with a reflection on "adaptation" and "ecological evolution"? What writing purpose does this structure serve?Prompt 2: What deeper logic connects the description of the forest's physical change to the final philosophical point?Prompt 3: What would change if the passage started with the final sentence about "change being an engine of evolution"?Prompt 4: How does the author use language (e.g., "unexpected opportunity," "resilient," "mosaic") to shape the reader's perception of the event from a negative to a positive one?示例回答：A1: The writer uses a from-specific-to-general structure. By starting with a specific event and ending with a broad philosophical conclusion, the author serves the purpose of using a concrete example to illustrate a universal principle, making the abstract idea of evolution more relatable and powerful.A2: The deeper logic is metaphorical. The physical transformation of the forest serves as a microcosm for a larger lesson about resilience and adaptation. The writer implies that the forest's story is a model for how all systems, perhaps even human societies, handle disruption.A3: If it started with the conclusion, it would become an argumentative piece upfront. The current narrative structure creates a journey of discovery for the reader, allowing them to witness the events and arrive at the same profound insight as the author, which is more engaging and persuasive.A4: The author deliberately frames the disaster not just as a loss but as an "opportunity." Words like "resilient" attribute positive agency to the new plants, and "mosaic" suggests beauty and complexity in the new state. This lexical choice guides the reader to interpret the change not as a tragedy but as a transformative and ultimately beneficial process.通过这种分层提问的方法，教师可以系统地引导学生从简单的语言理解逐步走向复杂的文本分析和批判性思考，真正实现深度学习。今日份彩蛋：我有了lovart手机版了！公众号，我觉得最值得看的文章是？当然是已经连着日更十一个月350篇的

items.title: AI批改单词听写靠谱吗？这个对比实验的结果，让我沉默了...
items.content:
这是吴熳的第423篇教学思考原创。今天回我工作的第一个学校去看了看老同事们，坐在林老师桌前，看到一堆作业本，我手痒了，打算拿学生的作业试验下，哪个AI能做作业批改。这个幸运儿手写的作业是这样的。这个书写实在很难给好评，但用在测试AI批改能力上刚刚好，既没有乱得完全看不明白，也没有写得规规矩矩毫无挑战性。于是，我用豆包，Kimi和文心分别测试了，结果如下，先说结论。豆包和Kimi在这一轮测试中，被文心打得一败涂地。豆包把正确的conversation识别错误了，而且它无法判断geo geeso其实是学生划掉了goose的前半截，再改成了geese。Kimi的识别就更离谱了。当我看到的时候，我开始怀疑人生，学生没有写Jeach这么离谱的词啊，再一看，哦，原来是把序号的后半截识别成了J。当时我感到很挫败，给林老师说：“天天说什么AI赋能，这么看，AI真干不了老师的活，这俩识别真不行。”然后我去KA21群吐槽，黄阿玛说：“拿百度下手试试，看看到底吹成那样。”刚好前几天小金鱼传染了我，用文心做了女将军暴揍小熊猫的漫画，于是我就拿它试了试，小金鱼还特地提醒我，文心有好几版，她用的4.5，蜡笔说5.0更好。于是，我就分别试了一下文心4.5和5的水平。在4.5的时候，就已经不错了，没有明显的拼写正确却识别错误的情况。然后我测试5，它陷入了长达两分钟的沉思。当我已经开始等得不耐烦的时候，文心5.0给了一个不错的批改结果。让我惊讶的是，第三个单词，写得极其离谱的everyone，文心5.0识别对了，如果我去改，我会认为这个是对的，只是会腹诽这学生写成这样，是在老师的容忍红线上来回横跳，但豆包，Kimi，文心4.5，都认为这是错的。于是我回到KA21群里反馈我的发现。所以，综上所述，暂时而言，测试过的AI，完全没有办法替代人类老师批改作业。即便是里面正确率最高的文心5.0，在效率上也远远不及人类。期待后续的大模型们继续卷，等到它们能批改学生任意鬼画符的那一天！今日份彩蛋：和老同事们一起吃了点午饭，果然中国人表达感情的方式就是请饭啊。再回到学校看我的老室友梅梅。公众号，我觉得最值得看的文章是？当然是已经连着日更十一个月350篇的

items.title: 30秒让课本人物动起来：这个AI视频生成技巧让英语课瞬间变大片
items.content:
这是吴熳的第424篇教学思考原创。今天有位老师提了一个问题。这个其实并不难，拿即梦就可以实现。首先，需要有两个主角，于是就拿备受好评的零成本把语法课变成侦探游戏：学生"八卦"老师的创意教学小案例里的两个主角的图来吧。我都甚至懒得抠图，直接把这两张图给即梦做了参考图。可以看到里面是有很多干扰元素的，但没关系，直接在即梦中传两张参考图就行。然后，很直白把你的需求写上去就行，我为了图片好看，就加了一个元素“林荫道”。下一步就是转视频了，点击你喜欢的图片，选择“生成视频”，即可。当然，这话说早了，因为这图相对而言角度不算很好，所以他俩没走进饭店，光压马路了！于是，不得不使出新的大招，首尾帧了。不用被这个词给吓到，其实说白了就是两张参考图而已。我先拿两张参考图，画了一张他俩在餐厅吃饭的图片。然后在视频生成部分，把压马路的和吃饭的图分别传上去。于是，老师的需求就被满足了！今日份彩蛋：常德的天，难得这么蓝。公众号，我觉得最值得看的文章是？当然是已经连着日更十一个月350篇的

items.title: 把听力课变成"班级投票大会"：这个设计让学生主动竖起耳朵
items.content:
这是吴熳的第425篇教学思考原创。英语听力教学信息差案例：关键抉择——你的意见至关重要教学目标： 学生能从一段包含两个选项的口头通知中，精确提取关键信息，并基于此信息进行投票和表达个人观点。核心情境： 学校给予本班一个特权，可以二选一作为本次运动会的班级奖励。但选择权完全交给学生。老师将公布这两个选项的具体细节，请仔细聆听，以便做出你的决定。教学步骤：第一步：制造悬念与赋予权力老师用兴奋且郑重的语气宣布："Class, I've got fantastic news! The school has given our class a special privilege for the Sports Day. We have two choices for our class reward, and the decision is entirely up to you. After you hear the options, you will vote. Listen very carefully, because your vote depends on understanding the details. Here are your choices..."第二步：呈现包含关键差异的听力材料老师清晰、稍带煽动性地宣读两个选项："Option A: An Extended Pizza Party. If we win the class spirit award, we will get 10 large pizzas of our choice. Plus, we can watch a movie in the classroom for the last two periods on Friday.""Option B: A Homework Pass & Extra Play. If we win, everyone gets a 'No Homework' pass for one weekend. Also, our whole class gets extra 45 minutes of free time at the sports field next Monday afternoon."（听力文本的设计核心：制造两难选择。选项A侧重即时、集体的感官享受；选项B侧重个人便利和额外的自由活动时间。两者吸引力相当，且细节具体，学生必须仔细聆听细节差异才能做出选择。）第三步：基于信息的决策与表达1. 即时投票： 听完后，老师立即说："Okay, now it's decision time. Let's have a quick vote. All for Option A, the Pizza Party, raise your hand. Now, all for Option B, the Homework Pass, raise your hand." 这个过程瞬间将听力理解转化为紧迫的决策。2. 观点辩论： 老师邀请双方阐述理由："Team Pizza, why do you choose A? ... Team Homework, what's your reason?" 学生为了捍卫自己的选择，会主动调用刚听到的信息（如："Because we can watch a movie!" "I want the homework pass!"），从而完成从听力输入到口语输出的自然转换。3. 最终确认： 老师宣布投票结果："The winner is Option B! So, let's all work hard to win that spirit award for our homework pass and extra play time!"为何此设计更能激发真正的信息渴望？1. 赋予权力感： 将选择权完全交给学生，让他们从被动接收者变为主动决策者。这与他们的切身利益直接相关。2. 制造认知冲突： 两个选项都极具吸引力且类型不同，迫使学生仔细权衡细节（是披萨+电影，还是免作业+自由活动？），从而极度专注地捕捉信息。3. 即时应用： 听力的目的不是为了答题，而是为了参与一场即将发生的、结果未知的投票。信息的价值在听后的几分钟内就得到了兑现。4. 激发真实辩论： 投票后的辩论环节，让学生为了“说服对方”而主动组织语言，信息成了他们辩论的“弹药”，使用语言变成了内在需求。这个设计将听力活动从“理解任务”升级为一场“决策预备会”，真正抓住了学生渴望参与、渴望被倾听的心理。今天所有的插图都是谷歌Gemini banana pro画的，真的惊为天人。今日份彩蛋：撸了一会胖小猫。公众号，我觉得最值得看的文章是？当然是已经连着日更十一个月350篇的

items.title: 从"假装读"到"必须读"：校园通知让英语阅读课秒变现实
items.content:
这是吴熳的第426篇教学思考原创。英语阅读教学真实情景案例：紧急通知 - 食堂菜单与校园施工教学目标： 学生能快速阅读校园内的真实公告，准确抓取并理解影响个人生活的关键信息。核心情境： 今天是周一，学校布告栏贴出了两则本周立即生效的重要通知，一则是关于食堂本周暂停供应热门餐食，另一则是关于校园施工导致部分区域封闭。这直接影响到你每天的午餐选择和课间活动。教学步骤：第一步：真实引入（制造信息需求）老师走进教室，用非常平常的语气说：“Alright everyone, before we start, a couple of quick but important notices from the school for this week. I saw them on the bulletin board just now. It's about the canteen and some construction. It affects your lunch and where you can go during break. Just read this quickly so you know what's going on.”（老师将以下通知文本投影或写在黑板上）第二步：提供真实、直接的阅读材料Notice 1: Canteen UpdateATTENTION: This Week's Canteen Changes· From: Monday, [Today's Date] to Friday.· Change: The popular Chicken Burger Meal will NOT be available.· Reason: The kitchen equipment for it is under repair.· Alternative: A new Beef Noodle Soup will be offered instead.· Reminder: The lunch lines might be longer than usual. Please be patient.Notice 2: Campus ConstructionIMPORTANT: Safety Notice - Playground Area Closed· Area Closed: The basketball courts and the surrounding area.· Duration: From Tuesday to Thursday this week.· Reason: Urgent repair work on the ground.· Alternative Play Area: Students can use the field behind the gym during breaks.· Warning: Do not enter the closed area. It is dangerous.第三步：设置真实、有目的的阅读任务1. 个人快速阅读（3-4分钟）： · 老师指令： “Please read both notices. Then, on a piece of paper, answer these two questions for yourself: 1. If you planned to have the chicken burger for lunch this week, what are your two options now? 2. You want to play basketball with your friends during the break on Wednesday. What should you do?”2. 同伴信息确认（Pair Work - 2分钟）： · 老师指令： “Check your answers with your partner. Did you get the same information? Where exactly is the alternative play area?”3. 全班快速确认与讨论（Whole-class Check - 2分钟）： · 老师随机提问学生答案。 · 可以追加一个快速的真实讨论：“Show me your hands, who's a bit disappointed about the chicken burger? Who wants to try the beef noodles?”这个设计为何能吸引学生注意力？1. 情境极致真实： 食堂菜品变化、校园区域施工，这是每个学生校园生活中最高频、最常遇到的事情，毫无表演痕迹。2. 信息直接影响行动： 学生阅读是为了知道“今天吃什么？”和“课间能去哪里？”，这是最直接、最原始的信息需求。3. 文本完全真实： 使用的语言和格式（项目符号、加粗关键词）完全模仿真实的校园公告，培养学生处理真实世界文本的能力。4. 零准备与高效率： 老师无需准备任何复杂物料，活动导入迅速，阅读和任务完成高效，完全可以在课前5分钟内完成，却达到了极强的教学目的。今日份彩蛋：在弟媳妇老家鱼塘一钩钓上两条鱼。公众号，我觉得最值得看的文章是？当然是已经连着日更十一个月350篇的

items.title: 当学生"闯祸"了：让英语写作变实用的神仙案例设计
items.content:
这是吴熳的第426篇教学思考原创。英语写作教学案例：澄清与道歉——给老师的一则书面说明教学目标： 学生能根据一个真实的突发情境，撰写一段简洁、清晰、得体的书面文字，用于解释情况、澄清误会并表达歉意。核心情境： 你和小组成员在课堂小组活动时因为讨论过于激烈，不小心弄坏了班级公用的一本教学道具（例如：一个地球仪、一本大幅挂图或一个模型）。现在需要你们立即写一份书面说明交给老师。教学步骤：第一步：制造真实且紧迫的情境· 老师（手持一个损坏的教具，如封面撕裂的大开本图画书，表情严肃但平静）： “Okay class, settle down. I need the attention of the group working here. I've just found this damaged book. I know it wasn't intentional, but we need to address this properly. It's a class resource, and everyone uses it. Your task now is this: As a group, I want you to write me a short, written note in English. You need to explain what happened, take responsibility, and apologize. This isn't about punishment; it's about learning how to handle situations responsibly. You have 10 minutes to write it together.”第二步：提供清晰的写作框架支持· 老师在黑板上写下写作框架： · Dear Mr./Ms. [Teacher's Name], · We are writing to explain about the [damaged item]. · What happened: [Briefly and honestly describe the situation. e.g., "During our group discussion, we were... and accidentally..."] · We are sorry for... [Apologize for the specific action and the result.] · We will be more careful next time. · Sincerely, · [Names of all group members]第三步：小组协作完成真实写作任务1. 小组讨论与起草（5-7分钟）： · 小组成员必须用英文讨论如何填写框架中的每个部分。他们需要共同还原事实、选择合适的动词和措辞来道歉。 · 老师巡视，提供必要的词汇帮助（如：accidentally, tore, dropped, broke, we are sorry, we apologize）。2. 撰写与提交（3分钟）： · 小组将最终版本工整地抄写在一张纸上，并全体签名。示例产出 (Student's possible output):Dear Mr. Wang,We are writing to explain about the torn map.What happened: During our group discussion, we were pointing at different countries and accidentally tore the map.We are sorry for damaging the class map. It was not our intention.We will be more careful next time.Sincerely,Li Ming, Zhang Wei, and Zhao Lin第四步：简单的后续与反馈· 老师收集纸条，快速阅读。· 在下课前或下次课上，老师可以口头反馈：“I have received the notes from the group. Thank you for handling this matter responsibly. The issue is now closed.”· 这种反馈让学生明确感受到，写作是一种有效的、解决真实问题的沟通工具，他们负责任的行为得到了认可。这个设计为何“极度真实”？1. 情境无法预演： 源于课堂上的真实意外（或模拟的意外），具有极强的即时性和真实性。2. 写作目的明确： 写作不是为了得分，而是为了解决一个真实的麻烦、修复关系、承担责任。学生有最强烈的动机把话说清楚、把态度表达到位。3. 文体真实有用： “书面说明”或“道歉信”是现实生活中极其实用的文体，培养了学生在真实世界中用英语处理问题的能力。4. 情感真实： 涉及了犯错后的不安、澄清事实的渴望以及希望获得谅解的心情，这些真实情感驱动了语言的输出。5. 社会技能整合： 这不仅仅是一次写作练习，更是一堂关于责任、诚实和沟通的社会情感学习课。今日份彩蛋：在某个蛋糕店里看到的好玩蛋糕设计🤓公众号，我觉得最值得看的文章是？当然是已经连着日更十一个月350篇的

items.title: 用材料匹配游戏，拯救沉默的口语课堂！
items.content:
这是吴熳的第427篇教学思考原创。英语口语教学案例：寻找完美搭档教学目标： 学生能使用特定句型（如："Do you have...?", "I have...", "Let's...!"）进行真实的信息问答与匹配，最终完成一个合作任务。核心情境： 学校即将举办“国际文化日”，每个两人小组需要共同完成一张海报。但材料有限且被随机分配，你必须找到那个拥有与你完全匹配的材料的搭档。教学步骤：第一步：制造信息差与任务悬念· 老师（手持一个装满信封的盒子）： “Listen up! For the upcoming International Culture Day, you will work in pairs to create a poster. But here's the catch: the materials for each country are split between two people. Inside these envelopes are your secret materials.” （举起两张能拼在一起的卡片，比如半张中国地图和半张中国地图，或者“Drag”和“on”） “Your mission is to find your perfect partner. The person whose material perfectly matches and completes yours. You must ask questions in English to find them. You cannot just show your card to everyone!”第二步：分发“秘密信息”并明确规则1. 分发材料： 老师分发提前准备好的信封。每个信封里包含： · 一张图片或文字卡片（例如：半张英国国旗 / 单词 "Sushi" / 图片“自由女神像的顶部”）。 · 一张任务指令卡，上面写着关键句型： · 问： "Do you have...?" / "What country is on your card?" · 答： "I have..." / "Yes, I do." / "No, I don't." · 成功时： "Let's make a poster about [Country]!"2. 宣布规则： · “You must walk around and talk to at least 3 different people before you decide on your final partner.” · “You can only use English. If you speak Chinese, you have to sit down for one minute as a penalty.” · “Once you find your partner, come to me, show me your matched materials, and get your poster paper!”第三步：执行“寻人”任务· 课堂实况： 教室瞬间变成一个活跃的“信息市场”。学生必须不断走动、提问。 · Student A: "Do you have... the bottom of the Eiffel Tower?" · Student B: "No, I don't. I have a kangaroo." (然后转向他人) "Do you have Australia?" · Student C: "What country is on your card?" · Student D: "I have 'Taco'. Do you have 'Mexico'?" · 当两人发现彼此的材料能拼合（比如一人有“Pizza”，一人有“Italy”）时，会非常兴奋地大喊："Let's make a poster about Italy!"第四步：任务验收与扩展1. 老师验证： 老师在教室前方充当“裁判”，验证每一对组合的材料是否真正匹配。这确保了任务的严谨性。2. 任务延伸： 配对成功后，合作并未结束。老师可以立即给出下一步指令：“Now with your partner, discuss and write down 3 facts you will put on your poster about your country.” 这又将口语活动自然过渡到了写作环节。这个设计的精妙之处：1. 绝对真实的信息差： 每个学生都掌握着他人不知道的、且对完成任务至关重要的“秘密”。他们不交流就无法行动。2. 强烈的内在动机： 目标是“找到另一半”，这本身就像一个游戏，充满了悬念和发现的乐趣。获取信息是为了达成一个令人期待的合作。3. 语言的自然运用： 目标句型（Do you have...? I have...）是完成任务唯一且最有效的工具。学生不是为了“说句型”而说话，而是为了“找搭档”而不得不使用这些句型。4. 极高的参与度： 每个学生都是信息的主动寻求者和提供者，必须全员参与，无法“搭便车”。5. 完整的任务闭环： 从接收秘密信息，到主动交流寻找，再到匹配成功并获取新任务，形成了一个完整的、有意义的语言应用闭环。今日份彩蛋：在飞机上被陌生妹妹强制投喂糖果和巧克力🍫公众号，我觉得最值得看的文章是？当然是已经连着日更十一个月350篇的

items.title: 语法课的无间道：让学生为了"打小报告"而疯狂使用现在进行时
items.content:
这是吴熳的第429篇教学思考原创。英语语法教学案例：老师看不见的“后台直播”语法点： 现在进行时 (Present Continuous Tense)核心情境： 老师需要背对全班，在白板上书写一段很重要的文字。在此期间，老师需要一个“后台助手”随时用英语小声汇报教室里同学们的实时状态，以确保大家都在认真准备接下来的小组活动，没有开小差。教学目标： 学生能准确使用现在进行时，实时描述眼前正在发生的、真实的动作和状态。具体步骤第一步：创建真实需求1. 老师（拿起马克笔，准备在白板上写字）： “Okay everyone, I need to write the group discussion questions on the board. This will take about two minutes. While my back is turned, I can't see you. I need to know that you are all getting ready. I need a 'helper'. This helper will whisper to me in English and tell me what the class is doing. For example, 'Tom is taking out his notebook.' This way I know you're all on task.”第二步：执行实时汇报1. 老师背对全班，开始板书，同时指定一名“助手”。2. 对助手说： “Okay, tell me. What is happening now? Who is working well?”3. 助手（会小声向老师汇报）： · “Zhang Lei is opening his book.” · “The girls in the front row are reading the instructions.” · “Wang Wei is talking to Li Ming... Now he is stopping.”4. 老师的反馈： 老师可以根据听到的汇报，自然地回应，如 “Good.” 或 “Thank you, I'm glad to hear that.” 这形成了一个真实的交流。第三步：轮换与强化1. 老师可以书写30秒后，换一名“助手”，说： “New reporter, give me an update. What is everyone doing now?”2. 这样可以确保更多学生参与产出，并且因为情境在持续，描述的内容也在不断变化。第四步：情境总结1. 老师写完转身，结束任务。2. 总结： “Thank you for your help. While I was writing, you were all working very well. I heard that Liu Yue was reading, Zhao Lin was writing, and everyone was preparing. Excellent. You were all using the 'present continuous' tense perfectly to describe those actions.”这个设计的真实性体现在：1. 绝对真实： 老师板书时看不见学生，需要了解课堂动态，这是一个极其常见且真实的管理需求。2. 零准备： 无需任何教具或提前准备，随时可以开始。3. 内在动机： 学生扮演的是有实际功能的“助手”角色，向权威者（老师）汇报情况，这本身就具有吸引力和一点小小的权力感。4. 语言自然运用： 使用现在进行时是这个任务的唯一选择，因为描述的就是“此刻正在发生”的事情。语言成为了完成任务的必要工具。5. 全员参与： 被描述的学生知道自己正在被“直播”，他们会更专注于完成“准备任务”的动作，从而为“助手”提供源源不断的、真实的描述素材。今日份彩蛋：小熊猫给我在地球某个角落找出来的我的名字。公众号，我觉得最值得看的文章是？当然是已经连着日更十一个月350篇的

items.title: 课本插画大改造：Lovart的Mark模式如何让配图无限贴合文本！
items.content:
这是吴熳的第430篇教学思考原创。还记得前一阵写的语法海报么？英语教学语法海报改字神器！Lovart分层编辑功能太香了这篇承蒙各位厚爱，那篇阅读量破万了，于是我兴奋地告诉同事占伟，他的名字已经被上万人看到了，占伟乐了，“看来我是名师而不自知。”当时那篇之所以受欢迎，我觉得就是因为它真正给老师们打开了一扇窗，原来英语语法海报，可以像在PPT上改字一样简单。但我还没有沉浸在这种快乐的情绪里太久，lovart这个公认的AI做图圈卷王，又接上了新的模型，Nano banana pro，俗称小香蕉2。于是，被好基友小熊猫又刺激之后，我决定再测试一波，看看小香蕉2这个模型，到底有什么特别！打开官网lovart.ai,小香蕉2已经醒目上线。话不多说，我先拿人教版八年级上册Unit 1 Happy Holiday的一篇游记来试试。其实，课本上的可视化工作，已经做得很好了。但，如果你希望让学生有“身临其境”的感觉，还是得画出来，毕竟大部分学生应该没有去过莫斯科。我先拿其他的AI工具，把课文放进去，做了一个镜头拆分表。然后在模型里选好 Nano banana pro。因为一次有十来张图，所以我选择了fast mode模式，毕竟，谁愿意把宝贵的时间放在等待上呢！大概不到两分钟，一整套完整的配图已经出来了，画风精美，色彩清新。当然，光好看不行，得值得信赖，毕竟我也没去过莫斯科，并不知道胜利博物馆长什么样，当我人工核实胜利博物馆的图时，确实很欣慰，小香蕉没骗我！两图不能说一模一样，至少也是双胞胎了。左边的图是lovart画出来的，右边的是实景图。为什么它能在没有给详细提示词的前提下，画出来可用的地标图呢？因为，我这次特地选中的就是Nano Banana Pro，你可以理解成，它自带了谷歌技术积淀下的世界知识和实时信息，所以生成的图，即便你没有查资料，没有写超级详细提示词描述胜利博物馆，也能画出来可信的图片。这时候不得不想起去年底画的天一阁了，那图画出来，和真正的天一阁，一点关系都没有，画图模型进化速度，恐怖如斯！那么，我们来看一看，课文内容，和图片的对应吧。Today was our first day to visit Moscow. The weather was fine and everyone felt excited to visit some famous places in Russia.是不是超级贴合文本？不过，还记得刚刚的胜利博物馆长什么样吗？显然不长这样啊！刚夸完就翻车，太丢脸了。但，人的主观能动性，不就是遇到问题，解决问题嘛！只要我把上面的字儿涂掉，这图完全能用啊！选中图片，点击Remover，清除器。选好需要擦除范围，再点击Remover。一张清新的莫斯科街头的早晨插画就好了。而且，如果是我去上这一节课，我一定会让学生好好观察这张图，预测下一站在哪儿。因为英语教学中的“听说读写看”，“看”在新课标中，就是必备技能。图片下方的Next Stop：Victory Museum，就能锻炼学生“看”以及“预测”的功能。In the morning, we went to the Victory Museum. The Russian people built this museum to remember their fight against the Nazis during World War II. As we walked through the halls, the tour guide told us stories about the war.看到这张图我笑了，游客们穿得都很正式呀，导游拿了个小蓝旗子。它还特地配了一行字母“Solemn Atomsphere”。如果我去上这节课，这个小字幕，其实是课文文本中没有，但确实可以给学生渗透教学的单词。这种自动按照图片配字的能力，也属于小香蕉2的异能了，做为全球目前排名第一的生图模型，它能在图像中直接生成更好、更准确且易读的多语言文本，也支持中文。但是，我得再泼一次冷水，这张图虽然和文本贴合，但小香蕉2有一点想当然了，真实的胜利博物馆里，照片是用“悬浮”的方式陈列的，以前我可能就得重新描述一次，写提示词了，但这次的lovart更新，有个mark模式。看看我怎么在完全不写提示词的情况下，告诉lovart我到底想要什么吧！在左边的对话框里，上传胜利博物馆真实的照片陈列方式参考图。通过Ctrl键，点选中你想参考的图片，此时可以进去mark模式。我选中了真实照片和插画，然后在画布中，告诉它，模仿照片1的陈列方式，修改图2中的照片。说实话，这也是我第一次用mark模式，胆子有点麻，不知道它会给我画成啥样，新功能嘛。但等了不到一分钟后，我彻底惊艳了，这个功能真的太争气了！它用了image analyzer分析出，我想要的图，是密集，重叠，不规则排列风格。我画出来之后，过于激动，立刻抓住同事占伟：“占伟我给你看个超牛逼的功能，你看，上面的图是大模型想象出来的胜利博物馆，这图乍看没毛病吧？”占伟：“没毛病啊。”我：“我要是告诉你，胜利博物馆里面的真实场景是这样的呢？”占伟：“那还是差点意思了。”我：“看，是时候见证什么叫真正的魔法了。我给它传了参考图，然后在画布里对话，告诉它我要你给我把这图，改成这样，就像你去食堂，你也不知道这菜叫什么，但你就是给打菜阿姨说我要这个和那个，最后食堂阿姨给你来了个双拼。”下图就是lovart修改过的“双拼”，和上面的真实图片，贴合度达到了90%！这时候，占伟的瞳孔差不多真炸裂了，直说：“牛逼牛逼！”我：“而且这种图，不仅仅适用于英语教学啊，你的物理课，也一样可以用的，我个人是喜欢画插画风格，但它用在真实照片中，或者你们物理实验示意图中，是一样的道理，你觉得大模型给你画的示意图不对，让它用mark模式再画，它就能根据正确的图，给你修补回来。这个功能叫做touch edit，意思是你拿鼠标点到哪里就可以改哪里。”占伟连连道好。不得不说，虽然我不是专业的设计，但lovart的这个专业画布交互，实在是太丝滑了，感觉我再稍微多用点这个功能，以后就可以去给教材做插画师了！上一段，结束，继续下一段配图。In one hall, I saw an artwork with thousands of glass “tears” falling down. It reminds us that war is terrible and peace does not come easily. We should not forget that.其实我在第一次阅读时，我也不知道玻璃眼泪是什么样的，小香蕉2直接给我画了一张超级浪漫唯美的图！！！但还是那句话，得去查证下，如果图片中有文字，和原文是否能对上？不出意外，和原文就对不上，因为原文写的日期是July 17th，它随手写了个日期是October 26th，这倒不怪它，我的提示词压根就没给这个信息。改一下，雕虫小技。选中图片，点击上次画语法海报时，我就非常喜欢的功能 “Edit elements”。点开Edit Elements，等待图片被拆分成“画面”和“文字”的元素。漂亮，那种手写的风格被保留下来了，文字也正确了，强迫症得到了极大满足。下一个场景：At noon, we had lunch at a restaurant near the park. I liked the ice cream there, so I ate a lot of it. 再下一张，But, during dinner, I didn’t feel like eating because I felt sick. So now, I just want to get a good night’s sleep.不得不说，小香蕉2画的图，和“莫斯科”实在是太配了！It rained last night, so this morning the air was fresh and cool. I felt much better today.We took the Moscow Metro to travel around. The metro stations are really beautiful. Sometimes I felt like I was walking inside a palace. After that, we went to Red Square. We saw some fantastic buildings there.In the afternoon, we arrived at a school and met a group of Russian students. We played games and soon became friends.Later, someone took out his accordion, and soon everyone got together to sing and dance. We were so happy that we didn’t notice the time. It was such a good experience!单看这张图，确实没什么问题，小朋友们围着拉手风琴的人。但场景和前面确实不一致了，没关系，找出来模式，我点选了手风琴演奏者，希望他在上一个场景中演奏。果然，如我所愿，这次场景就一致太多了。通过这整个完整的文本配图过程，我确实深深感受到了什么叫“哪里不行画哪里”的快感！以前我经常“欺骗”自己，课本配图嘛，是那个意思就行了。但实际上，从真正严谨的角度来说，不行。这次测试lovart的mark模式，给我最深的感受就是，只要你愿意，找到真实生活中的参考图，小香蕉2，能够毫不费力完成你自己脑袋里的想法！上公开课的时候，能用上这么精美的图，绝对能惊艳全场啊。这个工具不是免费的，但最近正在优惠期，我刚买完。1. 订阅解锁 365 天 0 积分畅享Nano Banana Pro（11.21–11.30）在此期间订阅 Basic 及以上会员，可在会员有效期内享受Nano Banana Pro 365 天 0 积分无限量。2.老会员同享所有现有 Basic+ 会员自动获得同样的 365 天 Banana Pro 0 积分权益。3. 多模型同步 365 天福利Nano Banana（NB1）、Seedream 4、Midjourney v7 同步享受 365 天 0 积分无限量使用。今日份彩蛋：为了迎接我休假回来，占伟送了我两盒牛奶，号称休假补贴！太快乐辣！公众号，我觉得最值得看的文章是？当然是已经连着日更十一个月350篇的

items.title: 一篇英文美文告诉你：什么才是真正的生活
items.content:
这是吴熳的第431篇教学思考原创。今天这篇文章的配图，一致性非常好，其实核心要点就是，一次性把文章给画图agent，所以画出来的效果就能保持一致啦。Once, a woman planted a small seed. She watered it with care every day, hoping it would quickly grow into a tall, strong tree. But for many days, the soil remained unchanged. The woman felt a flicker of impatience, but she never stopped caring for it.Then, one morning, she saw a tiny green sprout pushing through the earth. Her heart filled with joy. She continued to nurture the young plant. It grew slowly, facing sun and rain, but it grew steadily.Years flowed by. The little sapling became a magnificent tree with wide, welcoming branches. It offered shade to tired travelers, a playground for laughing children, and a quiet spot for dreamers.The woman, now with gentle lines on her face, sat beneath the generous canopy. A soft smile appeared on her lips as she understood. The true gift of the tree was not just the cool shade it provided now, but the entire journey—the patience, the hope, the gentle care through all the seasons.Life is like this tree. We often rush, wanting immediate results. But the most beautiful things in life—like trust, wisdom, and inner strength—grow slowly. They need our patience and consistent care. Don't just race for the final goal. Cherish each small step, each challenge that makes you stronger. Your own journey, with all its moments, is what shapes you into the strong and beautiful person you are meant to be. 今日份彩蛋：昨天刚看完疯狂动物城2，想画一个我自己左拥右抱狐狸和兔子。midjourney，完全忽略了参考图，效果很好，但对语义的理解相当不行。Seedream 4.0，给我染了个黄毛。还得是nano banana pro，画得最好了。公众号，我觉得最值得看的文章是？当然是已经连着日更十一个月350篇的

items.title: 英语阅读八大核心策略提问海报
items.content:
这是吴熳的第432篇教学思考原创。英语阅读八大核心策略，我做了一套海报。1. Cause and Effect 因果关系 （识别事件的原因和结果）2. Main Idea 主旨大意 （找出段落或文章的核心观点）3. Fact vs. Opinion 事实与观点 （区分客观事实与主观看法）4. Compare and Contrast 比较与对比 （找出事物间的相似点与不同点）5. Sequence / Chronological Order 排序 （理清事件、步骤的时间或逻辑顺序）6. Problem and Solution 问题与解决 （识别问题及为其提出的解决方案）7. Making Predictions 做出预测 （根据线索猜测接下来会发生什么）8. Making Inferences 做出推断 （结合线索与背景知识，读出字里行间的隐含意义）今日份彩蛋：在长阳体育公园，看乒乓球。公众号，我觉得最值得看的文章是？当然是已经连着日更十一个月350篇的

items.title: 当疯狂动物城遇上八年级英语：6张图搞定40个单词
items.content:
这是吴熳的第434篇教学思考原创。最近刚看了疯狂动物城2，谁还不喜欢尼克和朱迪这对小搭档呢？于是我冒出来一个新灵感，用疯狂动物城的画风和场景，来诠释人教版八年级上册Unit 1的前40个单词，一共做了6张配图，还带上了故事情节。原始单词表如下：ancient, myself, camp, nothing but, hotel, landscape, comfortable, strange, vacation, bored, fantastic, sky, towards, town, breath, rainbow, take sb’s breath away, square, especially, during, steamed chicken soup, victory, anywhere, Russian, nothing, fight, guide, against, scenery, silk, fight against sb, scarf, ready, thousands of, ready to do sth, tear, remind, somewhere下面是小香蕉2做出来的图，真的令人很惊叹！古迹探险 (Ancient Exploration)展示尼克和朱迪探索古老遗迹的场景，包含：ancient, landscape, scenery, sky, rainbow, town都市漫步 (City Stroll)生动的城市广场节日场景，包含：square, especially, during, towards, guide, remind旅途住宿 (Journey & Stay)分屏展示营地和酒店，包含：camp, hotel, vacation, somewhere, anywhere, comfortable心情体验 (Emotions & Impressions)朱迪遇见奇异生物，尼克感到厌倦，包含：fantastic, strange, bored, nothing but, myself, ready to do sth冒险对抗 (Conflict & Victory)激烈的动作场景，包含：fight, fight against sb, against, victory, thousands of, nothing特色细节 (Details & Delights)温暖的庆祝场景，包含：Russian, silk, scarf, steamed chicken soup, breath, take sb's breath away, tear, ready今日份彩蛋：这是上一版做出来的单词表，朱迪都被画秃了，然后我超喜欢这个nothing的诠释！公众号，我觉得最值得看的文章是？当然是已经连着日更十一个月350篇的

items.title: 一位老师的提问，让我挖到了这个课文跟读小工具
items.content:
这是吴熳的第442篇教学思考原创。有位老师问，如何给学生找跟读素材，我虽然知道，可以用AI写互动网页来做，但我相信，这种大众都需要的功能，必然有人做过，于是我稍微搜了下，发现果然有现成的产品。在微信小程序里搜“蜜蜂家校”，点击课本同步。选择单元或者课程，我随手选了我比较熟悉的人教版初中七年级上册内容。然后找到“跟读”。选择好内容发布即可发送到微信群。在群里点开布置的作业，界面如下。点击录音，系统会根据录音评分。暂时我试用的时候没有收费，但如果用得多，可能会有收费吧。小提醒：跟读的声音不是课文原录音。今日份彩蛋：去一家我常去的理发店，结果电视台的人在那拍摄，于是出镜给店主做了个客串，见到了用磁铁吸附的新耳麦。公众号，我觉得最值得看的文章是？当然是已经连着日更370篇的AIGC辅助英语教学实操合集呀！

items.title: 我用AI画图，把原画风画到亲妈都不认识了
items.content:
这是吴熳的第443篇教学思考原创。今天读到水的离子积的一篇推文，讲如何做贴纸物料，于是我基因狠狠动了。小水说做十套女将军和小熊猫的贴纸，于是我真开始动手。我给AI提供的原始参考图是这张，期待它能保持住这种类似手绘的温暖画风。结果，它终于没把小熊猫画成面瘫了，但画风保持得不够好。我看完开始想，为什么原来能保持住画风呢？不管是banana pro还是seedream 4.0，我给了参考图，都能画出来呀？于是我想，是不是因为我没有用gpt的模型。第二次画出来的，gpt感出来了，人物一致性没有了，女将军标志性的红裙子和金罗凤髻也没有了。于是我又仔细看了一遍小水的提示词，才恍然大悟，哦，我忽略了后面那一堆清洗画风的提示词，所以他把我的所有的画风都给强制清洗掉了。Kawaii sticker art style, bold black outlines, flat bright colors, vector aesthetics, simplified military uniform with cute decorations, isolated on white background, clear spacing between each pair, high contrast, game asset style, tsundere relationship dynamic。秘密就在小水提示词的后面这一堆词，把原画风清理得太干净了，于是画风转变得亲妈都不认识了。然后亲妈花了点积分，搞明白了问题出在自己这儿，没改这一堆提示词，所以做出来的效果让我震惊了。所以今天这个画图的小插曲，充分说明了，该好好写提示词，写提示词，别看着一大堆看着很牛的提示词上去就粘，画出来的效果，那就是和想象中差之千里呀。今日份彩蛋：和蜜蜜的快乐晚餐。公众号，我觉得最值得看的文章是？当然是已经连着日更370篇的AIGC辅助英语教学实操合集呀！

items.content: 这是吴熳的第444篇教学思考原创。今天分享的内容是分层次的听力教学活动设计。

items.title: 让AI当导游：我用Banana画了套故宫讲解图
items.content: 这是吴熳的第445篇教学思考原创。昨天去了故宫，让banana画一套故宫景点讲解图，不得不说还可以，虽然也有些硬伤，比如景山公园不在故宫内，但从查资料角度来说，Gemini 3的水平，已经比去年好了很多，期待2026年大模型的进步哇。

items.title: 模仿→支撑→半自由→自主：4个难度递进的口语教学活动模板
items.content: 这是吴熳的第446篇教学思考原创。今天的主题是，可复制、可生成资源的「4 个难度层口语教学活动」整体思路：不是“让学生多说”，而是逐步降低认知负荷、提高语言自主度。模仿 → 支撑 → 半自由 → 自主生成Level 1：模仿型口语（Controlled Speaking｜安全感层）核心目标：敢开口 + 发音 / 语音意识学生状态：不需要“想内容”，只需要“说出来”1️⃣ 学生在“说什么”完整句子固定表达可预测语言2️⃣ 典型口语活动跟读（Choral + Individual）句子接龙（Read & Repeat）替换操练（Substitution Drill）例子：I want to buy a gift for my friend.→ my sister / my teacher / my father3️⃣ 教师 / 你可以生成的“口语资源”【资源 1】Sentence-level Reading Audio【资源 2】Word Stress & Intonation Version【资源 3】Pause-for-Repeat VersionLevel 2：支架型口语（Guided Speaking｜结构支撑层）核心目标：在“被扶着”的情况下完成表达学生状态：需要思考，但有路可走1️⃣ 学生在“说什么”有框架有句型内容部分可替换

items.title: 学生听不懂英语视频？试试这个降速小技巧
items.content:
这是吴熳的第446篇教学思考原创。有老师给我说，有的学习视频语速太快了，学生听起来很费力。这个解决起来，倒是很简单，把视频导入剪映，然后选中视频，直接会出来变速的选项。我简单录制了个视频，看一遍就会！当然，更简单的方式是，在视频播放的时候，使用kmplayer或者potplayer，直接调整播放速度，也能加速或者降速，以适应学生的水平。今日份彩蛋：看电影《教父》的时候，也不忘记让女将军和小熊猫友情出演下里面的名场面。公众号，我觉得最值得看的文章是？当然是已经连着日更370篇的AIGC辅助英语教学实操合集呀！

items.title: 同一阅读语篇四层次处理方法
items.content: 这是吴熳的第448篇教学思考原创。Level 1｜识别型阅读（Decoding Reading｜安全感层）核心目标：我看得懂“字”和“句”学生心理状态：不焦虑、不怕错1️⃣ 学生在“读什么”原文不变语言表层信息高频词 + 明显结构2️⃣ 典型阅读活动找词（word spotting）划出人物 / 地点 / 时间句子–图片匹配T / F（只考原句）例子：Read and tick the words you can find in the text.□ gift □ money □ friend □ country3️⃣ 教师在“教什么”词形识别句法感知文本安全感建立👉 这是“我不怕阅读”的那一层Level 2｜信息提取型阅读（Scanning & Skimming｜技能训练层）核心目标：从文本中“抓信息”学生心理状态：有挑战，但有路径1️⃣ 学生在“读什么”原文关键信息（数字、名词、事实）2️⃣ 典型阅读活动填表 / 填空匹配（人物–行为）Wh- questions（what / where / how much）找段落主旨（选项给）例子：Read and complete the table.3️⃣ 教师在“教什么”Skimming 找大意

items.title: 一个写作任务，四种层次设计（附具体方案）
items.content: 这是吴熳的第449篇教学思考原创。Level 1｜仿写型写作（Imitative Writing｜安全感层）核心目标：我“写得出来”本质：写 ≈ 抄 + 选 + 填1️⃣ 学生在“写什么”单词短语完整句子（但不原创）2️⃣ 典型写作活动看图填词句子补全按模板替换信息抄写 + 圈出关键词例子：I want to buy a ______ for my ______.3️⃣ 教师在“支撑什么”提供完整句型给词库 / 句库明确对错标准👉 这一层解决的是“我不怕写”Level 2｜支架型写作（Guided Writing｜结构支撑层）核心目标：在“框架里”表达意思本质：内容部分生成，结构已给1️⃣ 学生在“写什么”句群短段落简单逻辑关系2️⃣ 典型写作活动半填空段落按提纲写看表格写描述句子重组（reorder & rewrite）例子：

items.title: 英语听说读写四层分层教学 Rubrics（全过程评价量规）
items.content: 这是吴熳的第450篇教学思考原创。本量规基于同一教学理念：同一内容，不同认知深度。评价不用于“筛选学生”，而用于看见学生此刻站在哪里。使用说明每一技能 不要求所有学生都达到 Level 4允许学生在不同技能上处于不同层级可用于：课堂观察 / 学生自评互评 / 项目式学习 / 成果展示

items.content:
这是吴熳的第455篇教学思考原创。Lesson 1: Christmas Traditions Around the World🌍Page 1 - 课程导入 • 学习目标：了解不同国家的圣诞传统 • 文化背景：美国、英国、德国、日本、澳大利亚 • 热身问题：激发学生兴趣Page 2 - 听力任务 • 听力活动：填表格 • 词汇学习：装饰、传统、食物 • 练习任务：与伙伴分享Lesson 2: Writing Christmas Cards❤️Page 3 - 写作框架 • 圣诞卡片结构：问候、正文、结尾 • 范例展示：完整的卡片样本 • 常用表达：祝福语句Page 4 - 学生创作 • 四步创作指南 • 写作框架模板 • 写作技巧提示 • 创意装饰建议Lesson 3: Christmas Story Time📖Page 5 - 阅读策略 • 故事介绍：《麦琪的礼物》 • 阅读策略：预测→阅读→反思 • 故事面板：六个关键场景 • 关键词汇学习Page 6 - 理解与讨论 • 三层理解问题：基础、推断、深度思考 • 讨论活动：Think-Pair-Share • 故事主题：爱与牺牲 • 创意延伸活动Lesson 4: Christmas Gift Planning🎁Page 7 - 口语任务 • 礼物规划框架：四步流程 • 对话练习：结构化对话 • 常用表达：解释选择的原因 • 礼物类别：手工、贴心礼物Page 8 - 项目展示 • 展示结构：介绍、内容、结尾 • 范例展示：完整的展示样本 • 展示技巧：声音、肢体语言、内容 • 同伴反馈表格Lesson 5: Christmas Song & Poem🎵Page 9 - 歌曲与诗歌欣赏 • 圣诞歌曲：《铃儿响叮当》 • 圣诞诗歌：《Christmas Magic》 • 韵律与节奏：找韵脚、打节拍 • 关键词汇学习Page 10 - 创意改编 • 改编歌曲：保持节奏，改变歌词 • 创作诗歌：四行结构 • 韵脚帮手：常用押韵词 • 分享表演：多种展示方式Lesson 6: Christmas Party Planning🎉Page 11 - 综合项目 • 项目任务：规划班级圣诞派对 • 规划清单：主题、时间表、活动、食物、装饰 • 团队角色：六种角色分工 • 团队合作流程Page 12 - 成果展示与庆祝 • 展示指南：六步展示结构 • 评价量规：内容、展示、创意 • 反思问题：学习回顾 • 课程总结：完整回顾与祝福今日份彩蛋：想去看电影没时间，先画一张臆想一下。公众号，我觉得最值得看的文章是？当然是已经连着日更380篇的AIGC辅助英语教学实操合集呀！

items.title: 收藏！定语从句藏宝图完整教学设计（12张PPT）
items.content:
这是吴熳的第457篇教学思考原创。我拿女将军和小熊猫的藏宝图，串联了一个以定语从句为主题的故事。Page 1 - 寻宝冒险故事导入 • 故事背景：神秘藏宝图 • 学习任务：通过定语从句解密 • 学习路线图Page 2 - 定语从句定义与作用 • 什么是定语从句 • 基本结构：名词 + 关系词 + 从句 • 三大作用：描述、提供信息、避免重复 • 关键成分：先行词、关系词、从句Page 3 - WHO/WHOM（描述人） • 用法：描述或识别人 • WHO作主语 vs WHOM作宾语 • 故事场景：寻找知情者 • 常见错误提醒Page 4 - WHICH/THAT（描述物） • 用法：描述物品、动物、想法 • WHICH vs THAT的区别 • 何时可以省略关系词 • 特殊情况（最高级、all、only等后用THAT）Page 5 - WHOSE（表示所属） • 用法：表示"谁的" • WHOSE = his/her/their + noun • WHOSE vs WHO'S的区别 • 故事场景：寻找宝藏主人的后代Page 6 - WHERE（描述地点） • 用法：描述或识别地点 • WHERE = in/at/on which • 故事场景：寻找藏宝地点 • WHERE vs WHICH的区别Page 7 - WHEN（描述时间） • 用法：描述或识别时间 • WHEN = at/in/on which • 故事场景：门打开的关键时刻 • WHEN vs WHICH的区别Page 8 - WHY（描述原因） • 用法：解释原因 • WHY = for which • 故事场景：理解藏宝的原因 • WHY的省略规则Page 9 - 限定性定语从句 • 定义：提供必要信息 • 特点：无逗号、可用THAT、不可删除 • 作用：识别是"哪一个" • 故事场景：三个箱子选择正确的一个Page 10 - 非限定性定语从句 • 定义：提供额外信息 • 特点：有逗号、不用THAT、可删除 • 作用：补充说明 • 与限定性的对比Page 11 - 特殊情况与常见错误 • 介词 + which/whom • 数量词 + of which/whom • What = the thing that • 6大常见错误及纠正 • 缩略形式（reduced clauses）Page 12 - 故事结局与完整总结 • 寻宝成功！ • 完整知识点回顾 • 快速决策树 • 关键规则总结 • 练习句子 • 成就证书今日份彩蛋：这几个小保镖也太可爱辣。公众号，我觉得最值得看的文章是？当然是已经连着日更380篇的AIGC辅助英语教学实操合集呀！

items.title: 2025，关于AI和英语教学融合的小技巧，都在这儿了！
items.content:
这是吴熳的第460篇教学思考原创。2025年，真的达成了日更，从来没有过的勤奋，得感谢所有向我提问过的朋友！年末，把最常问到的教学技术内容汇总一下，来年制作课件视频的时候，在我公众号里搜关键词，就可以了哦！也可以和我的数字分身提问我有了一个数字分身，24小时可以回答你的AI教学问题｜吴熳教学思考201视频制作：学生听不懂英语视频？试试这个降速小技巧30秒让课本人物动起来：这个AI视频生成技巧让英语课瞬间变大片原来ListenHub还能这样用！睡眠主题绘本视频几分钟做好视频制作、去水印、加字幕、剪辑...34个教程解决英语教学视频难题音频制作：我没想过，PDF也能直接转音频啊|吴熳教学思考90用AI处理英语教学音频的“七龙珠”，都在这里了！|吴熳教学思考88如何用Listenhub将阅读文本转换成播客？｜吴熳教学思考360人教版八年级上册Unit 7的单词表，我用TTSMaker做出了乱序+停顿的听写版本！｜吴熳教学思考317考完听力快速提取对话脚本，手机豆包就可以！｜吴熳教学思考273今日份小熊猫&Listenhub联名硬广｜吴熳教学思考261如何用5分钟制作课本大段文本跟读视频？|吴熳教学思考148画图制图：我用AI画图，把原画风画到亲妈都不认识了告别手动画图！DeepSeek助力教学理论文章可视化即梦4.0画图效果测试｜吴熳教学思考357原来，比例竟会直接影响AI画图的出图内容！｜吴熳教学思考183如何利用好问小白Deepseek功能，写好画图提示词？｜吴熳教学思考1779个AI画图APP画同一个小仙子，谁最美？|吴熳教学思考174学会用AI垫图，画图的一致性就保持住了！|吴熳教学思考170面试3个画图的外籍AI员工，谁审美最好（文末附彩蛋）|吴熳教学思考1437个AI画图软件出图美感评测，直接抄作业！|吴熳教学思考155思维导图：给AI一个主题，它就能给你总结语法规则思维导图|吴熳教学思考120把单元英语词汇放进对话框，自动分析语义并做出思维导图|吴熳教学思考106干货！6种词汇教学组织形式，让学生记得牢用得活一分钟，做好适合发小红书的英语教学知识卡片｜吴熳教学思考243英语说明文文本解读神器！输入文本AI直出流程图|吴熳教学思考73今日份彩蛋：感谢小熊猫基地和KA21的朋友们，给了我很多很多快乐的时刻！借用下鱼鱼做的图，感谢好基友小熊猫，头号站姐小金鱼，北极熊瓦叔，边牧Seele，风老师，毛毛 aka 阿真，蜡笔🖍️，贝果🥯，融融，ima宗主猫工头，哆啦A梦鱼鱼，史上最强强盗组合，乌鸦，三金……没有你们，就没有今天的我。最后，感谢数字生命卡兹克，没有卡老师就没有KA21群，也没有和这些有趣的人儿认识的机会！公众号，我觉得最值得看的文章是？当然是已经连着日更380篇的AIGC辅助英语教学实操合集呀！

items.title: 用我的声音讲我的故事：见证Listenhub的进化之路
items.content:
这是吴熳的第461篇教学思考原创。早上收到了Listenhub的元旦积分，于是就做了个视频，祝贺橘子🍊老师的Listenhub融资，用Listenhub写了一个我的视角的用户故事，而且还是用我的声音克隆出来的讲述，感觉真奇妙！从6月1号开始试用到现在，Listenhub已经半年了，一开始，它只是一个AI播客工具，后来，开始了一系列疯狂的进化过程，可以给文字后朗读，可以做成播客，banana上线的时候，开始可以画画，还有next music可以写音乐🎵还有声音克隆，视频讲解……这半年，就是近距离观察一个AI原生公司生长的过程，最好笑的是，年末买会员，因为群里一个群友顺口一说，橘子老师说，一代人有一代人的鸡蛋要领，静雯连夜采购了鸡蛋送给创作者们，看着listenhub越来越好，与有荣焉！今日份彩蛋：和球友们一起度过新年第一天！公众号，我觉得最值得看的文章是？当然是已经连着日更380篇的AIGC辅助英语教学实操合集呀！

items.title: 左上角右下角都能去！即梦去水印的两个小技巧
items.content:
这是吴熳的第469篇教学思考原创。上周连续更新了一周视频，今天分享一个@倒放教我的小方法，如何去掉即梦里的AI水印。因为我一直都不是很在乎即梦里面的水印生成，但前几天有个任务需要去水印，我立刻想到了提示词艺术家倒老师。他告诉我：重新编辑设为参考图，或者在无限画布里复制为图片。果然真言就一句话啊，我在电脑上打开画布，复制图片，就没有右下角水印了。我已经很满意效果了，结果倒老师追着我后面告诉我，左上角的“AI生成”水印是可以关的！直接用倒老师的图解释下怎么关吧……果然，做点什么事，都是要精益求精啊！今日份彩蛋：找了几个饭友聚餐，真的是，吃自己做的饭，就是好吃啊！公众号，我觉得最值得看的文章是？当然是已经连着日更380篇的AIGC辅助英语教学实操合集呀！

items.title: 手把手教你用WPS把图片PPT变成可编辑课件！
items.content:
这是吴熳的第470篇教学思考原创。最近很多人问我用AI做PPT的办法，其实最好的，应该是用html精确控制做出来PPT，但普通人也不太会。有个简单一点的办法，就是拿banana画图之后，再用WPS把图片转成PPT。比如，这是我的一张PPT，用画图方式做出来的。如果想改字，或者做出来一些动画，怎么调整呢？WPS最近出了一个功能，可以把pdf或者图片转成PPT。https://aippt.wps.cn/aippt/convert-ppt/home打开网址，即可看到上传按钮。传一张图片试试。等待转换。此时可以看到，WPS把文字转换了，当然丢失了原来的“字体”效果，但可以编辑这一点，很重要。点击图片上的文字或者小图元素，就会发现，可以编辑了。于是，我把女将军元素移走，把小熊猫移到了左边。当然这是手机操作啦，如果是电脑操作，功能会比现在展示更全面。今日份彩蛋：然后用饭友拍的照片，移花接木到了AGI bar门口，毕竟，这是敲的大模型第一股智谱的锣，本来我要去凑个热闹，结果略感冒就只能自己动手位移了。果然，AI时代，什么图都不能信。公众号，我觉得最值得看的文章是？当然是已经连着日更380篇的AIGC辅助英语教学实操合集呀！

items.title: New York City in the 1990s 阅读课件
items.content:
这是吴熳的第470篇教学思考原创。Reading Text: New York City in the 1990sNew York City in the 1990s was a place of amazing changes. At the beginning of the decade, the city faced many problems. Crime rates were high, and many neighborhoods were unsafe. The subway system was old and dirty, with graffiti covering most trains. Times Square, now famous for its bright lights and family-friendly attractions, was then full of abandoned buildings and dangerous streets.However, things began to change in the mid-1990s. Mayor Rudy Giuliani started new policies to make the city safer. Police officers walked through neighborhoods more often, and the city cleaned up graffiti from subway trains and buildings.Crime rates dropped significantly, and people began to feel safer walking around at night.The economy also improved during this time. Wall Street was booming, and many young professionals moved to the city for jobs. Old warehouses in neighborhoods like SoHo and Tribeca were turned into expensive apartments. Artists and musicians who had lived in these areas for years suddenly found themselves unable to afford the rising rents.Technology was changing the city too. Internet cafes opened on many street corners, where people could check email and surf the web for a few dollars an hour. Cell phones were becoming more common, though they were still large and expensive. The famous yellow taxis remained the main way to get around, as ride-sharing apps didn't exist yet.Cultural life in 1990s New York was vibrant and diverse. Hip-hop music, which had started in the Bronx in the 1970s, became mainstream. Artists like Notorious B.I.G. and Jay-Z told stories about life in New York through their music. Broadway shows attracted millions of tourists, and small theaters in Greenwich Village showcased new talent. The city's restaurants reflected its diversity, with cuisine from every corner of the world available within a few blocks.By the end of the decade, New York had transformed into a cleaner, safer, and more expensive city. While many celebrated these changes, others mourned the loss of the city's gritty character and worried about people being pushed out by high prices. The New York of the 1990s was a city in transition, setting the stage for the global metropolis it would become in the 21st century.今日份彩蛋：给小金鱼做了个新表情。公众号，我觉得最值得看的文章是？当然是已经连着日更380篇的AIGC辅助英语教学实操合集呀！

items.title: 高中英语新课标词汇记忆短文15篇
items.content:
这是吴熳的第471篇教学思考原创。id: vocabulary-articlesname: 高中英语新课标词汇记忆短文集type: markdowncontent: |- # 高中英语新课标词汇记忆短文集 *基于艾宾浩斯遗忘曲线的15篇主题短文* ## 使用说明 - 每篇文章后标注了核心词汇 - 建议按顺序阅读，每天1-2篇 - 重点词汇会在后续文章中复现 - 难度逐步递进，主题多样化 --- ## 第1篇：My School Life **主题：校园生活 | 难度：★☆☆** I am a student at Beijing High School. Every morning, I wake up at seven o'clock and have breakfast with my family. My mother always prepares delicious food for me. After breakfast, I take the bus to school. Our school is very beautiful with many trees and flowers. I have six classes every day. My favorite subject is English because our teacher is very kind and helpful. During lunch time, I eat in the school canteen with my friends. We often talk about our homework and share interesting stories. After school, I usually play basketball with my classmates. Sports help me stay healthy and strong. In the evening, I do my homework and read books. Before going to bed, I review what I learned today. I love my school life because it's full of joy and knowledge. **核心词汇**: student, school, morning, breakfast, family, mother, food, bus, beautiful, tree, flower, class, subject, English, teacher, kind, helpful, lunch, friend, homework, story, basketball, classmate, sport, healthy, strong, evening, book, bed, review, learn, joy, knowledge --- ## 第2篇：A Visit to the Museum **主题：文化参观 | 难度：★☆☆** Last Saturday, our class visited the National Museum. We took a bus there early in the morning. The museum building was huge and modern. Our guide was a friendly lady who knew a lot about history. First, we saw ancient Chinese art. There were beautiful paintings and sculptures from different dynasties. The guide told us interesting stories about each piece. Then we visited the science section. We learned about space exploration and saw models of rockets and satellites. My favorite part was the natural history area. We saw dinosaur bones and learned how these giant animals lived millions of years ago. There were also displays about different animals and plants from around the world. The visit lasted three hours. We took many photos and bought some souvenirs. This trip helped us understand our culture and history better. I hope we can visit more museums in the future. **核心词汇**: Saturday, class, visit, museum, bus, early, building, huge, modern, guide, friendly, lady, history, ancient, art, painting, sculpture, dynasty, story, piece, science, space, exploration, model, rocket, satellite, natural, area, dinosaur, bone, giant, animal, million, year, display, plant, world, hour, photo, souvenir, trip, culture, future --- ## 第3篇：My Family and Home **主题：家庭生活 | 难度：★☆☆** I live in a comfortable house with my parents and younger brother. Our home has three bedrooms, a living room, a kitchen, and two bathrooms. My bedroom is on the second floor, and I have decorated it with posters of my favorite movies and books. My father works as an engineer in a big company. He is very busy but always finds time to help me with my math homework. My mother is a nurse at the local hospital. She takes care of sick people and often tells us stories about her patients. My brother is only eight years old, but he's very smart. He loves reading and playing computer games. Sometimes we fight, but we usually get along well. On weekends, our family likes to go shopping or have picnics in the park. I feel lucky to have such a loving family. They support me in everything I do and encourage me to work hard at school. Home is the place where I feel safe and happy. **核心词汇**: live, comfortable, house, parent, younger, brother, home, bedroom, living room, kitchen, bathroom, floor, decorate, poster, movie, father, work, engineer, company, busy, find, time, help, math, mother, nurse, local, hospital, take care, sick, people, patient, eight, smart, love, reading, computer, game, fight, usually, get along, weekend, shopping, picnic, park, feel, lucky, loving, support, everything, encourage, hard, place, safe, happy --- ## 第4篇：Seasons and Weather **主题：自然环境 | 难度：★★☆** China has four distinct seasons, and each brings its own beauty and challenges. Spring arrives in March with warm sunshine and gentle rain. Trees begin to grow new leaves, and flowers bloom everywhere. Many people enjoy outdoor activities like hiking and cycling during this pleasant season. Summer can be quite hot and humid, especially in July and August. The temperature often reaches 35 degrees Celsius. People wear light clothes and spend time near lakes or rivers to cool down. Ice cream and cold drinks become very popular. Despite the heat, summer vacation gives students time to relax and travel. Autumn is my favorite season. The weather becomes cooler, and leaves change from green to golden yellow and red. Farmers harvest crops like rice and corn. It's perfect weather for studying and outdoor sports. Winter brings snow and freezing temperatures. People wear thick coats, scarves, and gloves to stay warm. Children love building snowmen and having snowball fights. Though it's cold, winter has its own charm and beauty. **核心词汇**: season, distinct, beauty, challenge, spring, arrive, March, warm, sunshine, gentle, rain, grow, leaf, bloom, everywhere, outdoor, activity, hiking, cycling, pleasant, summer, hot, humid, July, August, temperature, reach, degree, Celsius, wear, light, clothes, spend, lake, river, cool, ice cream, cold, drink, popular, despite, heat, vacation, give, relax, travel, autumn, favorite, cooler, change, golden, yellow, farmer, harvest, crop, rice, corn, perfect, study, sport, winter, snow, freezing, thick, coat, scarf, glove, stay, child, build, snowman, snowball, fight, though, charm --- ## 第5篇：Technology in Our Daily Life **主题：科技生活 | 难度：★★☆** Technology has completely transformed our daily lives. Smartphones have become essential tools that we use for communication, entertainment, and learning. With just a few touches on the screen, we can call friends, send messages, take photos, and access the internet. Computers play a crucial role in education and work. Students use them to research information, write essays, and create presentations. Many jobs now require computer skills, and people work from home using video calls and online platforms. The internet connects people worldwide. Social media allows us to share experiences with friends and family, even when they live far away. Online shopping has made it convenient to buy products without leaving home. We can order food, clothes, books, and electronics with just a click. However, technology also brings challenges. Some people spend too much time on their devices and forget to exercise or socialize face-to-face. It's important to find balance and use technology wisely to improve our lives rather than control them. **核心词汇**: technology, completely, transform, daily, smartphone, become, essential, tool, communication, entertainment, learning, touch, screen, call, message, photo, access, internet, computer, play, crucial, role, education, research, information, write, essay, create, presentation, job, require, skill, video, online, platform, connect, worldwide, social media, allow, share, experience, family, far away, shopping, convenient, buy, product, leave, order, electronic, click, however, bring, challenge, device, forget, exercise, socialize, face-to-face, important, balance, wisely, improve, rather, control --- ## 第6篇：Environmental Protection **主题：环境保护 | 难度：★★☆** Environmental protection is one of the most urgent issues facing our planet today. Climate change, pollution, and the destruction of natural habitats threaten the survival of countless species and affect human health. Air pollution in cities comes mainly from car emissions and factory smoke. This creates smog that makes breathing difficult and causes respiratory diseases. Water pollution occurs when chemicals and waste are dumped into rivers and oceans, killing fish and making water unsafe to drink. Deforestation is another serious problem. When forests are cut down for agriculture or development, we lose valuable ecosystems. Trees produce oxygen and absorb carbon dioxide, helping to regulate Earth's temperature. Without enough forests, global warming accelerates. Fortunately, many people are taking action to protect the environment. Recycling programs help reduce waste. Solar and wind energy provide clean alternatives to fossil fuels. Electric cars produce zero emissions. Governments are creating laws to limit pollution and protect endangered species. Everyone can contribute to environmental protection through small daily actions: using public transportation, saving electricity, reducing plastic use, and planting trees. Together, we can build a sustainable future for generations to come. **核心词汇**: environmental, protection, urgent, issue, face, planet, climate change, pollution, destruction, natural, habitat, threaten, survival, countless, species, affect, human, health, air, city, mainly, car, emission, factory, smoke, create, smog, breathing, difficult, cause, respiratory, disease, water, occur, chemical, waste, dump, ocean, kill, fish, unsafe, drink, deforestation, serious, problem, forest, cut down, agriculture, development, lose, valuable, ecosystem, produce, oxygen, absorb, carbon dioxide, regulate, Earth, temperature, enough, global warming, accelerate, fortunately, action, protect, recycling, program, reduce, solar, wind, energy, clean, alternative, fossil fuel, electric, zero, government, law, limit, endangered, everyone, contribute, public transportation, save, electricity, plastic, plant, together, build, sustainable, generation --- ## 第7篇：Food Culture Around the World **主题：饮食文化 | 难度：★★☆** Food culture reflects the history, geography, and traditions of different countries. Each nation has developed unique cooking methods and flavor combinations that tell stories about their people and lifestyle. Chinese cuisine varies greatly across regions. Northern China is famous for wheat-based foods like noodles and dumplings, while southern regions prefer rice dishes. Sichuan food is known for its spicy flavors, using lots of peppers and garlic. Cantonese cooking emphasizes fresh ingredients and light seasoning. Italian food culture centers around pasta, pizza, and fresh vegetables. Italians believe in using high-quality ingredients and simple preparation methods. France is renowned for its sophisticated cooking techniques and wine culture. French chefs have influenced culinary arts worldwide. Japanese cuisine focuses on freshness and presentation. Sushi, made with raw fish and rice, requires years of training to master. The Japanese also practice "washoku," a traditional dietary culture that emphasizes seasonal ingredients and balanced nutrition. Fast food has spread globally, but many countries are returning to traditional, healthy eating habits. Organic farming and local food movements are becoming popular as people recognize the importance of sustainable food production and cultural preservation. **核心词汇**: food, culture, reflect, geography, tradition, country, nation, develop, unique, cooking, method, flavor, combination, story, lifestyle, cuisine, vary, greatly, region, northern, famous, wheat-based, noodle, dumpling, southern, prefer, dish, Sichuan, spicy, pepper, garlic, Cantonese, emphasize, fresh, ingredient, light, seasoning, Italian, center, pasta, pizza, vegetable, believe, high-quality, simple, preparation, France, renowned, sophisticated, technique, wine, French, chef, influence, culinary, art, Japanese, focus, freshness, presentation, sushi, raw, master, practice, washoku, traditional, dietary, seasonal, balanced, nutrition, fast food, spread, globally, return, healthy, eating, habit, organic, farming, movement, popular, recognize, importance, sustainable, production, cultural, preservation --- ## 第8篇：Sports and Health **主题：运动健康 | 难度：★★☆** Regular exercise is fundamental to maintaining good health and preventing various diseases. Physical activity strengthens our muscles, improves cardiovascular function, and boosts mental well-being. Medical research consistently shows that active people live longer and have better quality of life. Different sports offer various benefits. Swimming is excellent for developing overall body strength while being gentle on joints. Running improves endurance and helps control weight. Team sports like basketball and football teach cooperation and leadership skills while providing intense physical workout. Yoga and martial arts combine physical exercise with mental discipline. These practices improve flexibility, balance, and concentration. Many athletes use meditation and breathing techniques to enhance performance and reduce stress during competitions. Unfortunately, modern lifestyle often involves long hours sitting at desks, leading to obesity and related health problems. Poor dietary choices, combined with lack of exercise, contribute to diabetes, heart disease, and other chronic conditions. Schools and communities are promoting sports participation through better facilities and programs. Governments invest in public gyms, parks, and recreational centers. Professional athletes serve as role models, inspiring young people to pursue active lifestyles and potentially professional sports careers. **核心词汇**: regular, exercise, fundamental, maintain, prevent, various, disease, physical, activity, strengthen, muscle, improve, cardiovascular, function, boost, mental, well-being, medical, research, consistently, active, live, longer, quality, different, benefit, swimming, excellent, develop, overall, body, strength, gentle, joint, running, endurance, control, weight, team, basketball, football, teach, cooperation, leadership, provide, intense, workout, yoga, martial art, combine, discipline, practice, flexibility, balance, concentration, athlete, meditation, breathing, technique, enhance, performance, reduce, stress, competition, unfortunately, modern, lifestyle, involve, hour, sit, desk, lead, obesity, related, problem, poor, dietary, choice, lack, contribute, diabetes, heart disease, chronic, condition, school, community, promote, participation, facility, program, government, invest, public, gym, recreational, center, professional, serve, role model, inspire, young, pursue, potentially, career --- ## 第9篇：Education and Learning **主题：教育学习 | 难度：★★★** Education systems worldwide are undergoing significant transformations to meet the demands of the 21st century. Traditional teaching methods are being supplemented with innovative approaches that emphasize critical thinking, creativity, and collaborative problem-solving. Digital technology has revolutionized classroom learning. Interactive whiteboards, tablets, and educational software make lessons more engaging and personalized. Students can access vast amounts of information instantly and participate in virtual exchanges with peers from different countries. However, educators recognize that technology alone cannot replace human interaction and guidance. Effective teaching requires understanding individual learning styles and adapting instruction accordingly. Some students learn best through visual presentations, while others prefer hands-on activities or auditory explanations. Higher education faces challenges including rising costs and questions about relevance to career preparation. Universities are developing new programs that combine theoretical knowledge with practical skills. Internships, research projects, and industry partnerships provide students with real-world experience. Lifelong learning has become essential as rapid technological advancement makes many skills obsolete quickly. Professional development courses, online certifications, and continuing education programs help workers adapt to changing job markets and maintain competitiveness. **核心词汇**: education, system, worldwide, undergo, significant, transformation, meet, demand, century, traditional, teaching, method, supplement, innovative, approach, emphasize, critical, thinking, creativity, collaborative, problem-solving, digital, revolutionize, classroom, interactive, whiteboard, tablet, educational, software, lesson, engaging, personalized, access, vast, amount, instantly, participate, virtual, exchange, peer, educator, recognize, alone, replace, interaction, guidance, effective, require, understand, individual, style, adapt, instruction, accordingly, visual, presentation, prefer, hands-on, auditory, explanation, higher, challenge, including, rising, cost, question, relevance, career, preparation, university, program, combine, theoretical, knowledge, practical, internship, project, industry, partnership, real-world, lifelong, essential, rapid, advancement, make, skill, obsolete, quickly, development, course, certification, continuing, worker, changing, market, maintain, competitiveness --- ## 第10篇：Cultural Exchange and Global Understanding **主题：文化交流 | 难度：★★★** Cultural exchange programs have become increasingly important in fostering international understanding and cooperation. These initiatives bring together people from diverse backgrounds, creating opportunities for meaningful dialogue and mutual respect. Student exchange programs allow young people to immerse themselves in foreign cultures while pursuing their education. Living with host families, attending local schools, and participating in community activities provide authentic cultural experiences that textbooks cannot offer. These programs develop language skills, cultural sensitivity, and global perspectives. International festivals and cultural events celebrate diversity while highlighting common human values. Art exhibitions, music performances, and literary readings showcase different traditions and contemporary expressions. Such events break down stereotypes and build bridges between communities. Business and academic conferences facilitate professional networking and knowledge sharing across borders. Researchers collaborate on global challenges like climate change, poverty, and disease prevention. These partnerships demonstrate that complex problems require collective solutions and international cooperation. Social media and digital platforms have created new opportunities for cross-cultural communication. Virtual reality experiences allow people to explore distant places and cultures without traveling. However, meaningful cultural exchange still requires genuine curiosity, open-mindedness, and willingness to challenge one's own assumptions and prejudices. **核心词汇**: cultural, exchange, program, increasingly, important, foster, international, understanding, cooperation, initiative, bring together, diverse, background, create, opportunity, meaningful, dialogue, mutual, respect, student, allow, immerse, foreign, pursue, host, attend, participate, community, provide, authentic, experience, textbook, offer, develop, language, sensitivity, global, perspective, festival, event, celebrate, diversity, highlight, common, value, exhibition, performance, literary, reading, showcase, tradition, contemporary, expression, break down, stereotype, bridge, business, academic, conference, facilitate, professional, networking, knowledge, sharing, border, researcher, collaborate, challenge, poverty, prevention, partnership, demonstrate, complex, require, collective, solution, social media, platform, cross-cultural, virtual reality, explore, distant, place, travel, genuine, curiosity, open-mindedness, willingness, assumption, prejudice --- ## 第11篇：Urban Development and City Planning **主题：城市发展 | 难度：★★★** Modern cities face unprecedented challenges as urbanization accelerates worldwide. Population growth, infrastructure demands, and environmental concerns require innovative urban planning strategies that balance economic development with sustainability and quality of life. Smart city initiatives integrate advanced technology to optimize resource management and improve public services. Sensors monitor traffic flow, air quality, and energy consumption in real-time. Data analytics help city planners make informed decisions about transportation systems, waste management, and emergency response protocols. Green architecture and sustainable building practices are becoming standard in urban development. Solar panels, rainwater harvesting systems, and energy-efficient designs reduce environmental impact while lowering operational costs. Vertical gardens and rooftop farms maximize green space in densely populated areas. Public transportation networks are expanding to reduce automobile dependency and carbon emissions. High-speed rail, electric buses, and bike-sharing programs provide eco-friendly alternatives for urban mobility. Pedestrian-friendly streets and cycling lanes encourage active transportation and improve public health. Mixed-use developments combine residential, commercial, and recreational facilities within walking distance. This approach reduces commuting time, supports local businesses, and creates vibrant neighborhoods. Community spaces, parks, and cultural venues foster social interaction and civic engagement among residents. **核心词汇**: modern, city, face, unprecedented, challenge, urbanization, accelerate, population, growth, infrastructure, demand, environmental, concern, require, innovative, urban, planning, strategy, balance, economic, development, sustainability, quality, life, smart, initiative, integrate, advanced, optimize, resource, management, public, service, sensor, monitor, traffic, flow, air, quality, energy, consumption, real-time, data, analytics, planner, informed, decision, transportation, waste, emergency, response, protocol, green, architecture, sustainable, building, practice, standard, solar, panel, rainwater, harvesting, efficient, design, impact, lower, operational, cost, vertical, garden, rooftop, farm, maximize, space, densely, populated, network, expand, automobile, dependency, carbon, emission, high-speed, rail, electric, bike-sharing, eco-friendly, alternative, mobility, pedestrian-friendly, street, cycling, lane, encourage, active, health, mixed-use, combine, residential, commercial, recreational, facility, walking, distance, reduce, commuting, support, local, business, vibrant, neighborhood, park, cultural, venue, social, civic, engagement, resident --- ## 第12篇：Scientific Discovery and Innovation **主题：科学创新 | 难度：★★★** Scientific breakthroughs continue to reshape our understanding of the universe and drive technological progress. From quantum physics to genetic engineering, researchers are pushing the boundaries of human knowledge and developing solutions to complex global problems. Medical science has achieved remarkable advances in treating previously incurable diseases. Gene therapy techniques can now correct genetic defects at the cellular level. Immunotherapy harnesses the body's natural defense mechanisms to fight cancer more effectively than traditional chemotherapy. Artificial organs and 3D-printed tissues offer hope for patients waiting for transplants. Space exploration has entered a new era with private companies joining government agencies in ambitious missions. Reusable rockets have dramatically reduced launch costs, making space more accessible. Scientists are studying Mars colonization possibilities and searching for extraterrestrial life through sophisticated telescopes and robotic probes. Artificial intelligence and machine learning algorithms are revolutionizing industries from healthcare to finance. AI systems can analyze vast datasets, identify patterns, and make predictions with unprecedented accuracy. However, ethical considerations about privacy, job displacement, and algorithmic bias require careful regulation and oversight. Climate science provides crucial data for understanding global warming and developing mitigation strategies. Renewable energy technologies are becoming more efficient and cost-effective, while carbon capture methods show promise for reducing atmospheric greenhouse gases. **核心词汇**: scientific, breakthrough, continue, reshape, universe, drive, technological, progress, quantum, physics, genetic, engineering, researcher, push, boundary, knowledge, develop, solution, complex, global, problem, medical, science, achieve, remarkable, advance, treat, previously, incurable, gene, therapy, technique, correct, defect, cellular, level, immunotherapy, harness, natural, defense, mechanism, fight, cancer, effectively, traditional, chemotherapy, artificial, organ, 3D-printed, tissue, hope, patient, wait, transplant, space, exploration, enter, era, private, company, join, government, agency, ambitious, mission, reusable, rocket, dramatically, launch, cost, accessible, study, Mars, colonization, possibility, search, extraterrestrial, sophisticated, telescope, robotic, probe, intelligence, machine, algorithm, revolutionize, industry, healthcare, finance, system, analyze, dataset, identify, pattern, prediction, accuracy, ethical, consideration, privacy, job, displacement, algorithmic, bias, regulation, oversight, climate, provide, crucial, data, global warming, mitigation, renewable, efficient, cost-effective, carbon, capture, atmospheric, greenhouse, gas --- ## 第13篇：Literature and Arts **主题：文学艺术 | 难度：★★★** Literature and arts serve as mirrors reflecting human experiences, emotions, and societal transformations throughout history. Creative expression transcends cultural boundaries, connecting people across time and geography through shared themes of love, loss, hope, and struggle. Classical literature continues to influence contemporary writers and thinkers. Shakespeare's plays explore timeless themes of ambition, jealousy, and redemption that remain relevant today. Ancient Chinese poetry captures the essence of nature and human relationships with elegant simplicity. These masterpieces provide insights into different civilizations and universal human nature. Modern art movements have challenged traditional aesthetic conventions and expanded artistic possibilities. Impressionism revolutionized painting by emphasizing light and color over realistic representation. Abstract expressionism freed artists from literal interpretation, allowing emotional and psychological exploration through form and texture. Digital technology has democratized creative production and distribution. Independent filmmakers can now produce high-quality movies with modest budgets. Online platforms enable writers to publish directly to global audiences without traditional publishing gatekeepers. Virtual galleries make art accessible to people who cannot visit physical museums. Arts education faces funding challenges in many schools, despite research showing its benefits for cognitive development and critical thinking. Creative activities enhance problem-solving skills, emotional intelligence, and cultural awareness. Supporting arts programs ensures future generations can appreciate and contribute to humanity's cultural heritage. **核心词汇**: literature, art, serve, mirror, reflect, human, experience, emotion, societal, transformation, throughout, history, creative, expression, transcend, cultural, boundary, connect, across, time, geography, shared, theme, love, loss, hope, struggle, classical, influence, contemporary, writer, thinker, Shakespeare, play, explore, timeless, ambition, jealousy, redemption, remain, relevant, ancient, Chinese, poetry, capture, essence, nature, relationship, elegant, simplicity, masterpiece, provide, insight, civilization, universal, modern, movement, challenge, traditional, aesthetic, convention, expand, artistic, possibility, impressionism, revolutionize, painting, emphasize, color, realistic, representation, abstract, expressionism, free, literal, interpretation, allow, emotional, psychological, exploration, form, texture, digital, democratize, production, distribution, independent, filmmaker, produce, high-quality, movie, modest, budget, online, platform, enable, publish, directly, audience, publishing, gatekeeper, virtual, gallery, accessible, physical, museum, education, funding, despite, research, show, benefit, cognitive, development, critical, thinking, activity, enhance, problem-solving, intelligence, awareness, support, ensure, future, generation, appreciate, contribute, humanity, heritage --- ## 第14篇：Economic Development and Globalization **主题：经济全球化 | 难度：★★★** Globalization has fundamentally transformed the world economy, creating unprecedented interconnectedness between nations while generating both opportunities and challenges for developing and developed countries alike. International trade has expanded exponentially, with multinational corporations establishing supply chains that span multiple continents. Manufacturing processes are distributed globally to optimize costs and efficiency. Raw materials might be extracted in Africa, processed in Asia, and assembled into finished products in Europe for worldwide distribution. Financial markets operate continuously across time zones, with electronic trading systems facilitating instant capital flows. Investment decisions made in New York can immediately impact economies in Tokyo, London, and emerging markets. This interconnectedness provides opportunities for growth but also increases vulnerability to economic crises. Developing nations have experienced rapid industrialization and urbanization, lifting millions out of poverty. Export-oriented manufacturing has created employment opportunities and generated foreign currency reserves. However, income inequality has widened in many countries, and environmental degradation has accompanied rapid economic expansion. Technology transfer and knowledge sharing have accelerated innovation and productivity improvements. Multinational companies bring advanced technologies and management practices to developing markets. Educational exchanges and professional training programs build human capital and technical expertise. Critics argue that globalization has led to job losses in developed countries and exploitation of workers in developing nations. Trade agreements must balance economic efficiency with social responsibility and environmental protection. **核心词汇**: globalization, fundamentally, transform, world, economy, create, unprecedented, interconnectedness, nation, generate, opportunity, challenge, developing, developed, country, alike, international, trade, expand, exponentially, multinational, corporation, establish, supply, chain, span, multiple, continent, manufacturing, process, distribute, globally, optimize, cost, efficiency, raw, material, extract, Africa, process, Asia, assemble, finished, product, Europe, worldwide, distribution, financial, market, operate, continuously, zone, electronic, trading, system, facilitate, instant, capital, flow, investment, decision, New York, immediately, impact, economy, Tokyo, London, emerging, interconnectedness, growth, increase, vulnerability, economic, crisis, nation, experience, rapid, industrialization, urbanization, lift, million, poverty, export-oriented, employment, foreign, currency, reserve, however, income, inequality, widen, environmental, degradation, accompany, expansion, technology, transfer, knowledge, sharing, accelerate, innovation, productivity, improvement, company, bring, advanced, management, practice, market, educational, exchange, professional, training, build, human, capital, technical, expertise, critic, argue, lead, job, loss, exploitation, worker, agreement, must, balance, efficiency, social, responsibility, protection --- ## 第15篇：Mental Health and Well-being **主题：心理健康 | 难度：★★★** Mental health awareness has gained significant attention as societies recognize the profound impact of psychological well-being on individual productivity, relationships, and overall quality of life. Breaking down stigma surrounding mental illness remains a crucial challenge requiring comprehensive education and cultural change. Stress-related disorders have become increasingly prevalent in modern society. Work pressure, academic competition, financial concerns, and social media comparison contribute to anxiety and depression among people of all ages. The COVID-19 pandemic has exacerbated these issues, with isolation and uncertainty affecting millions worldwide. Therapeutic interventions have evolved beyond traditional counseling to include innovative approaches. Cognitive-behavioral therapy helps individuals identify and modify negative thought patterns. Mindfulness meditation and yoga practices promote emotional regulation and stress reduction. Art therapy and music therapy provide alternative channels for expression and healing. Workplace mental health programs are becoming standard in progressive organizations. Employee assistance programs offer confidential counseling services, stress management workshops, and flexible work arrangements. Companies recognize that supporting employee well-being improves productivity, reduces absenteeism, and enhances organizational culture. Schools are implementing social-emotional learning curricula to teach children coping strategies and emotional intelligence. Peer support groups, school counselors, and mental health screening programs help identify and address issues early. Creating supportive environments where students feel safe to express their feelings is essential for healthy development. Technology offers new tools for mental health support, including therapy apps, online support communities, and telemedicine consultations. However, digital solutions cannot replace human connection and professional expertise in treating serious mental health conditions. **核心词汇**: mental, health, awareness, gain, significant, attention, society, recognize, profound, impact, psychological, well-being, individual, productivity, relationship, overall, quality, life, break, down, stigma, surround, illness, remain, crucial, challenge, require, comprehensive, education, cultural, change, stress-related, disorder, become, increasingly, prevalent, modern, work, pressure, academic, competition, financial, concern, social, media, comparison, contribute, anxiety, depression, age, COVID-19, pandemic, exacerbate, issue, isolation, uncertainty, affect, million, worldwide, therapeutic, intervention, evolve, beyond, traditional, counseling, include, innovative, approach, cognitive-behavioral, therapy, help, identify, modify, negative, thought, pattern, mindfulness, meditation, yoga, practice, promote, emotional, regulation, reduction, art, music, provide, alternative, channel, expression, healing, workplace, program, standard, progressive, organization, employee, assistance, offer, confidential, service, management, workshop, flexible, arrangement, company, support, improve, reduce, absenteeism, enhance, organizational, culture, school, implement, social-emotional, learning, curriculum, teach, child, coping, strategy, intelligence, peer, group, counselor, screening, address, early, create, supportive, environment, student, feel, safe, express, feeling, essential, healthy, development, technology, tool, app, online, community, telemedicine, consultation, however, digital, solution, cannot, replace, human, connection, professional, expertise, treat, serious, condition公众号，我觉得最值得看的文章是？当然是已经连着日更380篇的AIGC辅助英语教学实操合集呀！

items.title: 豆包一键生成对话+配图：PPT制作的新玩法
items.content:
这是吴熳的第476篇教学思考原创。今天看到一位老师在做课件配图，勾起了我的兴趣，我的想法是，有没有可能让豆包同时出对话和图片，这样基本不用排版？实践证明，可以。我们拿一段对话为例。**Characters**: Lily and Tom**Topic**: School Activities and Hobbies**Lily**: Hi Tom! How was your school day?**Tom**: It was great! We had a PE class this morning. We played basketball.**Lily**: Wow, basketball is fun! Do you like PE class?**Tom**: Yes, I do! It’s my favorite subject. What about you?**Lily**: My favorite class is art. I love to draw pictures.**Tom**: That’s awesome! Do you draw at school or at home?**Lily**: I draw at school in art class, and I draw animals at home too.**Tom**: Cool! What school activities do you join?**Lily**: I join the painting club. We meet every Wednesday. Do you join any clubs?**Tom**: Yes! I’m in the football club. We play football on the playground every Friday.**Lily**: That sounds like a lot of fun! Let’s watch each other’s club activities sometime.**Tom**: Good idea! Let’s go! The bell is ringing.正常情况下，可以直接把对话给豆包，让它画配图，我想，能不能让它同时把对话的内容也配上呢，于是我稍微试了几次，做出来了如下效果：在豆包的网页版上粘贴对话，它会先设计人物形象，然后根据对话画图，下面是手办风。下面是变体：像素风。彩铅风。水墨风。油画风。漫画风。试验了很多次，下面是提示词：为这段对话配上定格漫画，保留所有的台词，保留人物一致性，对话框为圆形，背景对应对话内容。记得在电脑上用豆包画，在手机上是不会有这种效果的！如果对话超过10句，给它说“继续”就可以了。今日份快乐：球友陪我聊到晚上十点。公众号，我觉得最值得看的文章是？当然是已经连着日更400篇的AIGC辅助英语教学实操合集呀！
